overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a white winged horse flying through an autumn mountain valley, transitioning through heavy fog to a coastal cliff area. The lighting shifts from golden hour to an ominous orange-red fog as the creature navigates the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley with autumn forest canopy

events.description: creature banks left while descending slightly toward the valley floor

agents.ego_description: white winged horse flying steadily through the valley with wings fully extended, gliding over the colorful autumn canopy

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain peaks with snow patches visible on upper slopes
steep mountain ridge line against the cloudy sky
dense forest with orange and red autumn foliage covering the valley floor
tall evergreen trees mixed among the autumn deciduous trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a mountain valley during golden hour. The winged horse flies steadily over a dense canopy of autumn-colored trees, with mountain ranges framing both sides of the valley. The creature banks left mid-segment, descending slightly while maintaining a smooth gliding motion.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain settlement area with scattered ruins

events.description: fog begins to roll in from the mountains, gradually reducing visibility
lighting shifts to darker orange tone as the sun sets behind the mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: flying lower over a mountain village area, navigating between slopes while the atmosphere becomes increasingly misty

entered.detail: wooden buildings and stone ruins scattered across the mountainside
vertical cliff faces with exposed gray stone
thick white mist rolling through the mountain pass ahead

segments.scene_description: The creature flies over a sparsely populated mountain settlement with wooden structures and ruins visible below. Fog begins to roll in around the 22-second mark, gradually obscuring the distant peaks. The lighting shifts to a more diffused orange as the segment progresses, with steep rock walls appearing on the right as the path narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain pass with steep rock walls

events.description: visibility drops significantly as dense orange fog envelops the scene
emerging from the mountain pass to reveal coastal cliffs and ocean water below

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through thick fog with reduced visibility, wings beating steadily while hugging the terrain

entered.detail: shadowed vertical cliff faces forming the left wall of the narrow pass
steep rock walls with jagged edges on the right side
rocky coastline emerging from the fog with waves crashing below
dark turbulent sea visible through breaks in the fog

segments.scene_description: The creature navigates a narrow mountain pass completely enveloped in dense orange fog, with visibility reduced to near zero. Steep rock walls flank both sides. Around the 55-second mark, the fog begins to clear slightly to reveal the coastal cliffs and ocean water below, marking the transition from mountain terrain to coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffs and open ocean shoreline

events.description: creature banks sharply right to follow the cliff edge along the coastline

agents.ego_description: flying low over the turbulent water along the cliff edge, adjusting altitude to avoid the rocky outcroppings

entered.detail: tall vertical cliff with layered rock formations rising immediately to the right
isolated rock pillars standing in the ocean away from the main cliff
white foam and spray where waves hit the coastal rocks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the winged horse flying low over the open ocean along a dramatic coastline. The steep cliff face rises immediately to the right while turbulent waves crash against the rocks below. Sea stacks are visible in the distance through the lingering mist. The creature banks sharply to follow the contour of the cliffs as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey through a vibrant autumn valley that gradually descends into a fog-shrouded mountain pass. It begins with a wide view of a winged horse gliding over a dense canopy of autumn-colored trees, framed by towering mountain ranges under the glow of golden hour. As the creature banks left and descends, the landscape shifts toward a sparsely populated settlement of wooden structures and ruins. The scene then becomes increasingly enclosed as steep rock walls rise on the right and a thick fog rolls in, obscuring the distant peaks. Finally, the lighting transitions from a bright gold to a diffused orange as the path narrows within the encroaching mist.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast, dramatic coastal landscape. It begins with the winged horse navigating a narrow corridor of steep rock walls completely enveloped in dense orange fog, where visibility is reduced to near zero. As the fog begins to clear, the mountain terrain gives way to a sudden reveal of towering coastal cliffs and the ocean water far below. The scene then expands as the creature flies low over the open sea, passing turbulent waves crashing against the rocks and distant sea stacks lingering in the mist. Finally, the camera banks sharply to follow the jagged contour of the cliff face as the horse glides along the shoreline.
